ai.title: Your AI Companion
ai.subtitle: A safe space to share your thoughts and feelings
ai.welcomeTitle: How can I support you today?

landing.heroDesc1: A safe and supportive space where you can talk openly about your thoughts and feelings.
landing.heroDesc2: Therapy can be short-term or long-term  we grow with you at your pace.

items.title: Postpartum Depression: The Unseen Struggle
items.summary: There is cultural pressure that a new mother should only be happy. But many mothers suffer from postpartum depression. This article explains symptoms, solutions, and when to seek help.

items.title: Marriage and Mental Health: Self-Care
items.summary: In Ethiopia, many marriages are arranged. For women, this means living with a stranger. This blog explains how to cope with mental pressures, depression, and anxiety in arranged marriages.

items.title: He Went Abroad: Wives Left Behind
items.summary: Thousands of Ethiopian women are left alone when their husbands move to find work abroad. This article explores the loneliness, anxiety, and family pressure faced by the waiting wives.

items.title: The Burden of Silence: Healing
items.summary: In Ethiopia, women who have suffered sexual assault often stay silent out of fear and shame. This blog explains trauma, how to heal, and how to get help anonymously.
